response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong testing/craftsmanship background and some D/C++ exposure, but the role requires 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with cloud compute focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primarily web/product work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops)
Some exposure to high-throughput, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far short of 8 years of C++ experience (only ~6 months at National Instruments)
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Software craftsmanship and mentoring track record
